title: BuildResult
description: JSON output from `vow build` on stdout

executable.description: Path to compiled binary, or null on failure

diagnostics.description: Compiler diagnostics (parse errors, type errors, vow violations)

message.description: Error detail (present only when status is CompileFailed)

function.description: Function name (present only when status is VerifyFailed)

counterexample.description: Legacy counterexample description (present only when status is VerifyFailed)

verify_status.description: Verification sub-status (present only on timeout or tool error)

verify_message.description: Verification error message (present only when verify_status is error)
